data.homepage_text: Home | Beyond Bitcoin, now interoperable: securely bridge any token to, from, and within Bitcoin L1. Bitcoin, now interoperable: securely bridge any token to, from, and within Bitcoin L1. Home | Beyond Bitcoin, now interoperable: securely bridge any token to, from, and within Bitcoin L1. Home | Beyond Listen to Beyond's new 𝕏 Spaces Why Beyond Features Security Ecosystem Documentation Docs Launch App Documentation Launch App B eyond Digital Boundaries Bitcoin, Now Interoperable Bridge the largest digital assets like USDT, ETH, or SOL to Bitcoin L1. Move BTC, BRC-20s, or Runes—like ORDI or DOG—to 140+ chains and L2s. Switch between Bitcoin token standards in a breeze. Powered by Securely bridge any token to, from, and within Bitcoin—L1 and L2s—and unlock the full potential of your holdings. Context A Shift In History Bitcoin has a $1.4 Trillion market cap, but currently only 0.1% exists as DeFi TVL! Blockchain as an industry suffers from liquidity being spread across markets. Finance has been redefined by Bitcoin, yet it's practical applications were limited until now. Cross-Chain Beyond enables you to securely bring any major digital asset—like USDT, USDC, ETH, or SOL—from over 70 different blockchains, to Bitcoin L1 as a native token in your preferred standard: BRC-20, Runes... Cross-Standard Switch back and forth between any Bitcoin token standard, like BRC-20 <> Runes, without leaving the L1. Forget about fragmentation—with Beyond, the Bitcoin Ecosystem is one and only. Native Support Seamlessly use the largest Bitcoin tokens in any dApp and chain in the industry: Uniswap, Aave, Jupiter, Ethereum, Base, Solana—all now accessible. Beyond blurs the limits of the Bitcoin Ecosystem. Pause Animation Solution Going Beyond Digital Gold Beyond accelerates a future where Bitcoin becomes the powerhouse for DeFi on a global scale. Bridge in a breeze Seamless cross-chain and cross-standard interoperability. Connect > Choose > Submit... that's it! 0 1 Prime Functionality Use your favorite blue-chips (ETH, SOL, BTC), stablecoins (USDT, USDC) and Bitcoin tokens (ORDI, DOG) across any chain, any standard, and any protocol. For example: use ORDI on Uniswap, or USDT on Liquidium! 0 2 Multi Standard Bridge to and from any of the major Bitcoin token standards: BRC-20, Runes, Fractal... You name it. And with Beyond, you can even switch between standards without leaving Bitcoin L1! 0 3 Omnichain Interoperability Bitcoin L1 is now connected to the entire blockchain industry, globally: 80+ chains, 500+ tokens. Powered by LayerZero. Documentation Launch App Security Safety First, Always Beyond implements comprehensive, thorough security measures at every level of the protocol. Rigorous Auditing Beyond's internal reviews and external audits by specialized firms—such as Zokyo, trusted by Polygon, Solana Foundation, and L0—ensure prime system reliability. Battle-tested Infrastructure Omnichain asset transfer secured by LayerZero, with US$50 billion of global value transferred, and featuring the world's largest bug bounty program at US$15 million. Bug Bounty We value permissionless community involvement. Once Beyond goes live on mainnet, the protocol will launch together with a significant, permanent bug bounty program. Beyond Guardians Beyond uses industry-grade cryptography with a private-key PoA multisig approach. Before any transaction can be completed, it must pass through multiple globally distributed Guardian nodes, with each node independently conducting its own validation process prior to verifying. Safety Measures Security is a top priority, with a variety of measures in place to ensure the integrity of cross-chain transactions. Please click here for a link to Beyond's documentation that lists the key security features and practices employed. Continuous Testing & Monitoring Our rigorous testing pipeline includes regular security assessments, penetration testing, and custom infrastructure that verifies state changes. Rigorous Auditing Beyond's

customer_types.name: Digital Asset Professionals
customer_types.description: Sophisticated users seeking advanced cross-platform asset management and interoperability solutions for complex financial strategies.

personas.name: Enterprise Strategy Manager
personas.description: Technical professional managing multi-chain digital asset portfolios for institutional clients
questions: How can I seamlessly transfer high-value assets between different financial networks without multiple transaction fees?
What security protocols ensure my organization's asset transfers remain protected during cross-platform movements?
Can I maintain full transaction transparency while moving assets across different technological ecosystems?
What verification processes confirm the integrity of assets during standard conversions?
How quickly can large-scale asset transfers be executed between disparate financial networks?

personas.name: International Finance Researcher
personas.description: Academic professional studying global digital asset movement and technological interoperability
questions: What methodologies track asset liquidity when transferring between different technological standards?
How do cross-platform transfers impact transaction settlement times and cost efficiency?
Can assets maintain their original valuation characteristics when moving between different technological frameworks?
What metrics demonstrate the scalability of multi-standard asset transfers?
How do technological bridges resolve potential standardization conflicts during asset migration?

customer_types.name: Technical Innovation Enthusiasts
customer_types.description: Early adopters and technology-forward individuals exploring cutting-edge digital asset management solutions.

personas.name: Startup Founder
personas.description: Technology entrepreneur seeking flexible asset management tools for emerging digital projects
questions: How can my startup leverage multi-standard asset transfers to reduce financial friction?
What integration capabilities exist for connecting different technological ecosystems?
Can I programmatically automate asset transfers across multiple platforms?
What developer resources support building applications using cross-platform asset migration?
How do technological bridges minimize potential transfer risks for emerging digital projects?

personas.name: Technology Innovator
personas.description: Technical professional exploring advanced digital asset migration strategies
questions: What architectural approaches enable seamless asset transfers between different technological frameworks?
How do sophisticated transfer mechanisms handle complex asset type conversions?
Can I customize asset transfer protocols for unique technological requirements?
What performance benchmarks demonstrate cross-platform asset migration efficiency?
How are technological standards negotiated during multi-network asset movements?
